idea-plugin.name: Maho
idea-plugin.description:
Developer tooling for the Maho ecommerce platform.

Code intelligence (LSP)

  • Autocomplete for class aliases, config paths, event names, template paths, layout handles
  • Structural XML autocomplete for config.xml, system.xml, adminhtml.xml, and layout files
  • Go-to-definition for class aliases, templates, and methods
  • Hover documentation with class resolution, rewrite info, and observer details
  • Diagnostics for unresolved aliases

AI integration (MCP)

  • Auto-configures the Maho MCP server for Junie / AI Assistant by writing .junie/mcp/mcp.json

Database

  • Auto-configures a Database Explorer data source from app/etc/local.xml (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite)

CLI

  • Run maho commands from a dedicated tool window and the Tools menu

Requirements

  • A Maho project with the maho CLI in the project root
  • PHP available on PATH (or configured in settings)
